Records.authors: Parra-Martinez, Julio, Ruf, Michael S., Zeng, Mao
Records.description: Two-loop planar double-box (III/RT) topology with two massive matter lines (masses m1, m2) and three graviton (massless) propagators connecting them, plus two extra propagators (k1-q)^2 and (k2-q)^2 used as ISPs. Scalar integral I_RT = I_{1,1,1,1,1,1,1,0,0}. After soft expansion (linearized matter propagators) the family has 10 master integrals (vs 23 for the equal-mass full integral) organized into a canonical pure basis (f_RT,1..10), with even/odd-|q| sectors. Differential equations are in canonical dlog form with alphabet {x, x-1, x+1}. Boundary conditions taken from the static (potential-region) limit; results expanded through O(eps^0) for the small-q expansion of the full double-box.
Records.location: Section 4.2.1, Eqs. (4.30)-(4.32) (eq:TwoLoopPropsFull), Fig. 7 (props_RT). Pure basis: Eqs. (4.39)-(4.48). Crossed version xRT.
